overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a historic city at night. The character travels from a narrow alley through an open park, enters a mansion grounds, passes through a side passage, and emerges onto a cobblestone street illuminated by gas lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow muddy alley between brick and wooden walls

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open park area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow muddy alley toward the open park visible ahead

entered.detail: Cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow illuminating the alley
Weathered wooden fence running along the left side of the passage
Tall red brick wall on the right side of the narrow alley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow muddy alley at night, passing a glowing gas lamp on the left. Tall walls enclose the space on both sides as the character approaches an opening to a park area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open park field with scattered trees

events.description: entering open grassy area from enclosed alley, sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking across open grassy field toward distant illuminated buildings on the horizon

entered.detail: Deciduous trees with autumn foliage scattered across the open field
Illuminated buildings visible on the horizon beyond the park

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a wide open park area under a night sky. Scattered trees dot the grassy field as the character walks toward a large mansion visible in the distance, with city lights twinkling on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion grounds with manicured garden and front path

events.description: entering mansion property through iron front gate
turning right to proceed around the side of the mansion house

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the mansion grounds through an iron gate, walking up the front garden path toward the house

entered.detail: Large two-story colonial-style mansion with white columns and shuttered windows, warmly lit from within
Ornate wrought iron gate marking the entrance to the property
Paved stone walkway leading from the gate to the mansion entrance
Wall-mounted gas lantern illuminating the mansion entrance area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand colonial mansion, enters through the iron front gate, and walks up the garden path. After reaching the front of the house, the character turns right to go around the side, passing a glowing wall lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between mansion and adjacent building

events.description: ascending stone stairs along the side of the mansion
exiting the property through a side gate onto the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs along the mansion's side wall, proceeding through a narrow passage between buildings, and exiting onto the street

entered.detail: Stone staircase ascending along the side wall of the mansion
Metal gate at the end of the narrow passage leading to the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the mansion's front yard into a narrow side passage, climbs stone stairs between the mansion and a neighboring building, and exits through a side gate back onto the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with gas lighting

events.description: emerging from narrow passage onto illuminated cobblestone street
slowing down and looking around at the street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cobblestone street, pausing to observe the historic buildings and street lamps

entered.detail: Wet cobblestone street reflecting the warm glow of gas lamps
Ornate cast iron street lamp with bright warm light
Multi-story historic stone buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
Parked horse-drawn carriage on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a historic cobblestone street illuminated by warm gas lamps. The wet stones reflect the light as the character walks past ornate street lamps and historic buildings, eventually slowing to observe the surroundings near a parked carriage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic muddy alleyway into the expansive grounds of a colonial estate before returning to a brightly lit city street. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow, walled passage illuminated by a single gas lamp, moving forward until the space opens into a wide, grassy park under a night sky with twinkling city lights on the horizon. As the character approaches a grand mansion, the camera follows them through an iron gate and along a garden path, shifting from the open field to the structured architecture of the estate before turning right past a glowing wall lantern. The scene then tightens as the character enters a narrow side passage and climbs stone stairs between buildings, eventually passing through a side gate. Finally, the camera emerges onto a historic cobblestone street where warm gas lamps reflect off wet stones, gliding past ornate buildings and a parked carriage.
